changeLogMessages: Added ICloudFrontSigner and DelegateCloudFrontSigner, plus overloads of AmazonCloudFrontUrlSigner.SignUrl/GetCustomSignedURL and AmazonCloudFrontCookieSigner.GetCookiesForCustomPolicy that accept an ICloudFrontSigner, so policies can be signed with AWS KMS or another external signer (RSA or ECDSA P-256) without holding the private key in the process.
